---
title: "Other Software"
description: "SAS macros and other statistical software by Michael Friendly. Extensive collection of SAS macros for statistical graphics, multivariate methods, and categorical data analysis."
image: "images/hexsession-mypkgs.jpg"
twitter-card:
  image: "images/hexsession-mypkgs.jpg"
open-graph:
  title: "SAS Macros and Software by Michael Friendly"
  description: "Extensive collection of SAS macros for statistical graphics, multivariate methods, and categorical data analysis."
  image: "images/hexsession-mypkgs.jpg"
---

::: {.column-page}

In addition to R packages, in an earlier life, I developed extensive collections of SAS software for statistical graphics and data analysis.

## SAS Macros

::: {.callout-note}
## Maintenance Status
These macros are **no longer actively maintained** but remain available as a historical resource and for those still using SAS.
:::

I have developed an extensive collection of SAS macros for statistical graphics and data analysis. These macros cover a wide range of statistical methods with an emphasis on graphical display.

### Categories

- **Graphical methods**: Scatterplot matrices, enhanced plots, diagnostic displays
- **Multivariate methods**: Correspondence analysis, canonical correlation, discriminant analysis
- **Categorical data**: Mosaic displays, odds ratio plots, loglinear models
- **Regression diagnostics**: Influence plots, partial regression plots
- **Statistical graphics**: Quantile plots, rootograms, and more

### Resources

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card}
::: {.card-body}

**Documentation**

Comprehensive documentation for each macro with examples and usage notes.

[Browse documentation →](https://www.datavis.ca/sasmac/){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card}
::: {.card-body}

**Source Code**

All macro source code is freely available on GitHub.

[View on GitHub →](https://github.com/friendly/SAS-macros/){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

:::
:::
:::

:::

## Other Tools

Additional software tools and utilities are available through my GitHub repositories at [github.com/friendly](https://github.com/friendly).

:::
